feature: Bot UAT Rescope — Admin CRUD APIs + Bot Handlers + Playwright Tests
requirement: Rescope UAT to ensure the bot can do ALL administration tasks including creating instruments, commodities, managing fee rules, warehouse facilities, etc. Add missing CRUD APIs, wire them into the bot executor, and write Playwright UAT tests verifying each action works via bot conversation.

tasks.title: Admin CRUD APIs — instruments, commodities, fee rules, facilities
tasks.description:
Add missing admin CRUD API endpoints to the gateway for operations that currently have no API.

Create/update `src/gateway/internal/refdata/handlers.go`:
- POST /api/v1/admin/instruments — create instrument
  Body: {id, commodity_id, name, delivery_month, delivery_year, contract_size, tick_size, currency, settlement_type}
  Inserts into reference.instruments table
- PUT /api/v1/admin/instruments/{id} — update instrument (status, trading_hours, dates)
- POST /api/v1/admin/commodities — create commodity
  Body: {id, name, category, unit}
  Inserts into reference.commodities table

Create `src/gateway/internal/fees/admin_handlers.go`:
- POST /api/v1/admin/fees/schedules — create fee schedule
- POST /api/v1/admin/fees/rules — create fee rule (already partially exists)
- PUT /api/v1/admin/fees/rules/{id} — update fee rule
- PUT /api/v1/admin/fees/tiers/{participant_id} — set participant tier

Update `src/gateway/internal/tickets/handlers.go`:
- POST /api/v1/admin/tickets — admin create ticket (already exists as POST /api/v1/tickets)

Add warehouse admin routes in gateway handler:
- POST /api/v1/admin/warehouse/facilities — register facility (proxy to warehouse-service)

Wire all new routes in `src/gateway/cmd/gateway/main.go`.
All admin routes require admin role.

Acceptance: All new endpoints return 200/201 with correct data. `go build && go test` pass.

tasks.title: Bot executor — add handlers for all new CRUD + existing unhandled actions
tasks.description:
Update the bot executor to handle ALL admin CRUD operations including the new APIs.

Update `src/gateway/internal/bot/executor.go`:

1. **Instrument management**:
   - 'create instrument wheat jul 2027 contract 5000 tick 0.0025' → POST /api/v1/admin/instruments
   - 'list instruments' (already works)
   - 'update instrument WHT-... status suspended' → PUT /api/v1/admin/instruments/{id}

2. **Commodity management**:
   - 'create commodity rice grain kg' → POST /api/v1/admin/commodities
   - 'list commodities' → GET /api/v1/commodities

3. **Fee management**:
   - 'create fee schedule Standard 2027' → POST /api/v1/admin/fees/schedules
   - 'set trader ABC tier to farmer' → PUT /api/v1/admin/fees/tiers/ABC
   - 'add fee rule trading farmer 10bps' → POST /api/v1/admin/fees/rules

4. **Warehouse management**:
   - 'register facility Ulaanbaatar Grain Storage' → POST /api/v1/admin/warehouse/facilities
   - 'issue receipt farmer1 wheat 5000 bushels' → POST /api/v1/warehouse/receipts
   - 'pledge receipt RCP-001' → POST /api/v1/warehouse/receipts/RCP-001/pledge
   - 'create delivery...' → POST /api/v1/warehouse/deliveries

5. **Settlement**:
   - 'trigger settlement' / 'run settlement cycle' → POST /api/v1/settlement/cycle (if exists) or indicate not available

6. **Screening**:
   - 'screen participant ABC' → POST /api/v1/screening/check
   - 'batch screen all participants' → POST /api/v1/screening/batch

Update the help text to include ALL new commands.

Acceptance: 'help' lists 50+ commands. All new actions callable via natural language.

tasks.title: MCP tools — add CRUD tools for instruments, commodities, fees, facilities
tasks.description:
Add MCP tools for all new admin CRUD APIs so Claude CLI can also execute them.

Update `src/admin-bot/mcp-server/src/tools/`:

1. Update `market_data.ts` — add:
   - create_instrument(id, commodity_id, name, delivery_month, delivery_year, contract_size, tick_size, currency, settlement_type)
   - update_instrument(id, status?, trading_hours?)
   - create_commodity(id, name, category, unit)

2. Update `fees.ts` — add:
   - create_fee_schedule(name, effective_from)
   - create_fee_rule(schedule_id, fee_type, participant_tier, rate_bps, min_fee?, max_fee?)
   - set_participant_tier(participant_id, tier)

3. Update `warehouse.ts` — add:
   - register_facility(name, address, capacity_mt, commodities_accepted[])
   - issue_receipt(holder_id, commodity_id, quantity, facility_id)
   - pledge_receipt(receipt_id)
   - create_delivery(receipt_id, destination)

4. Update `participants.ts` — add:
   - screen_participant(participant_id)
   - batch_screen()

Rebuild: `npm run build`

Acceptance: 45+ MCP tools total. Build succeeds.

tasks.title: Playwright UAT — bot CRUD tests (create instrument, commodity, fees, etc.)
Playwright UAT — API contract tests for new CRUD endpoints
tasks.description:
Add API contract tests for the new admin CRUD endpoints.

Update `tests/playwright/uat/api-contracts.spec.ts` — add tests for:

1. POST /api/v1/admin/instruments — creates instrument (or 503 if DB not configured)
2. POST /api/v1/admin/commodities — creates commodity
3. POST /api/v1/admin/fees/schedules — creates fee schedule
4. POST /api/v1/admin/fees/rules — creates fee rule
5. PUT /api/v1/admin/fees/tiers/{id} — sets participant tier
6. POST /api/v1/admin/warehouse/facilities — registers facility
7. POST /api/v1/warehouse/receipts — issues receipt
8. POST /api/v1/warehouse/receipts/{id}/pledge — pledges receipt
9. POST /api/v1/warehouse/deliveries — creates delivery
10. POST /api/v1/screening/check — screens participant

Each test: verify status < 500, response is JSON, expected fields present.
Skip gracefully when DB/service not available (503).

Acceptance: 10+ new API contract tests. All pass or skip gracefully.

tasks.title: Bot executor tests — Go unit tests for all new CRUD handlers
tasks.description:
Add Go unit tests for all new bot executor CRUD handlers.

Update `src/gateway/internal/bot/executor_test.go` — add tests for:

1. 'create commodity rice grain kg' → calls POST /admin/commodities
2. 'create instrument ...' → calls POST /admin/instruments
3. 'update instrument WHT status suspended' → calls PUT /admin/instruments/...
4. 'list commodities' → calls GET /commodities
5. 'set tier farmer for trader1' → calls PUT /admin/fees/tiers/trader1
6. 'add fee rule trading farmer 10bps' → calls POST /admin/fees/rules
7. 'register facility UB Grain Storage' → calls POST /admin/warehouse/facilities
8. 'issue receipt farmer1 wheat 5000' → calls POST /warehouse/receipts
9. 'pledge receipt RCP-001' → calls POST /warehouse/receipts/RCP-001/pledge
10. 'screen participant ABC' → calls POST /screening/check
11. 'batch screen' → calls POST /screening/batch
12. 'help' → contains 'instrument', 'commodity', 'fee', 'warehouse'

Use httptest.NewServer mock pattern. 15+ tests.

Acceptance: All tests pass. Every new executor path tested.

tasks.title: Docker rebuild + UAT verification
tasks.description:
Rebuild the gateway with all new CRUD endpoints and verify via UAT.

1. `cd src/gateway && go build ./... && go test ./...` — verify build
2. `docker compose build gateway admin-ui` — rebuild containers
3. `docker compose up -d gateway admin-ui` — deploy
4. Re-register admin user
5. Run full UAT: `cd tests/playwright && npx playwright test uat/ --project=uat`
6. Report results

Acceptance: All UAT tests pass. Bot can create instruments, commodities, manage fees via conversation.
